rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the three Prop-classes (AffineAlgGroup, ReductiveGroup, SemisimpleGroup) lack the Mathlib-standard Is-prefix used by IsUnipotent in the same file, that unipotentRadical_trivial' has a poor name reflecting the proof act rather than content, and that unipotent_radical_trivial : True overstates the name relative to the trivial type — all real, diff-grounded naming issues that Review 2's blanket approval misses entirely.
